rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (6/10) and rest on the same substantive reasoning: strong developer-tooling and C IDE background, but weak alignment with Java/Kotlin/Spring/JVM requirements. The wording differs (the variant phrases strengths more expansively and frames the candidate as a 'maybe'), but every concern and strength maps to the same job-relevant facts about the resume. None of the differences key off the name change; they read as ordinary run-to-run rewording noise.
